zh: 焦點團體，一種用於收集意見和反饋的小組討論。
en: In every focus group, there's a range of characters.
en_example: In every focus group, there's a range of characters.
zh_example: In every focus group, there's a range of characters.
ja: フォーカスグループ、意見やフィードバックを収集するためのグループディスカッション。
ja_example: In every focus group, there's a range of characters.

zh: 主持人，負責引導討論和確保每個人都有發言機會的人。
en: It's my job as the moderator to make sure that they all get heard.
en_example: It's my job as the moderator to make sure that they all get heard.
zh_example: It's my job as the moderator to make sure that they all get heard.
ja: モデレーター、議論を導き、全員の意見を聞く役割の人。
ja_example: It's my job as the moderator to make sure that they all get heard.

zh: 無條件地，沒有任何限制或條件地。
en: Love welcomes everyone unconditionally.
en_example: Love welcomes everyone unconditionally.
zh_example: Love welcomes everyone unconditionally.
ja: 無条件に、制限や条件なしに。
ja_example: Love welcomes everyone unconditionally.

zh: 內心對話，自己與自己之間的思考和交流。
en: My mind has plenty of quirks, but what I have to share is for anyone with an inner dialogue.
en_example: My mind has plenty of quirks, but what I have to share is for anyone with an inner dialogue.
zh_example: My mind has plenty of quirks, but what I have to share is for anyone with an inner dialogue.
ja: 内なる対話、自分自身との思考や会話。
ja_example: My mind has plenty of quirks, but what I have to share is for anyone with an inner dialogue.

zh: 矛盾的感受，同時存在的相反情緒。
en: We can have conflicting feelings at the same time.
en_example: We can have conflicting feelings at the same time.
zh_example: We can have conflicting feelings at the same time.
ja: 矛盾する感情、同時に存在する相反する感情。
ja_example: We can have conflicting feelings at the same time.

zh: 治療，心理輔導或治療過程。
en: Those thoughts send many of us to therapy.
en_example: Those thoughts send many of us to therapy.
zh_example: Those thoughts send many of us to therapy.
ja: セラピー、心理カウンセリングや治療の過程。
ja_example: Those thoughts send many of us to therapy.

zh: 同理心，理解和感受他人情感的能力。
en: It's my job to practice empathy with strangers.
en_example: It's my job to practice empathy with strangers.
zh_example: It's my job to practice empathy with strangers.
ja: 共感、他人の感情を理解し感じる能力。
ja_example: It's my job to practice empathy with strangers.

zh: 創傷後壓力症候群，經歷重大創傷後的心理壓力反應。
en: The qualities which made me seem skillful were symptoms of complex post-traumatic stress.
en_example: The qualities which made me seem skillful were symptoms of complex post-traumatic stress.
zh_example: The qualities which made me seem skillful were symptoms of complex post-traumatic stress.
ja: 心的外傷後ストレス障害、重大なトラウマ後の心理的ストレス反応。
ja_example: The qualities which made me seem skillful were symptoms of complex post-traumatic stress.

zh: 過度警覺，對環境過度敏感和警惕的狀態。
en: This hyper-vigilance made me a certified mess of a person.
en_example: This hyper-vigilance made me a certified mess of a person.
zh_example: This hyper-vigilance made me a certified mess of a person.
ja: 過度警戒、環境に対して過敏で警戒心が強い状態。
ja_example: This hyper-vigilance made me a certified mess of a person.

zh: 無條件的歡迎，完全接受且不帶評價的態度。
en: I practiced something that I call unconditional welcome.
en_example: I practiced something that I call unconditional welcome.
zh_example: I practiced something that I call unconditional welcome.
ja: 無条件の歓迎、評価なしに完全に受け入れる態度。
ja_example: I practiced something that I call unconditional welcome.

zh: 視覺化，透過想像形成心中畫面或情境的技巧。
en: I called up my new age visualization skills.
en_example: I called up my new age visualization skills.
zh_example: I called up my new age visualization skills.
ja: ビジュアライゼーション、想像を通じて心の中に映像や状況を作る技術。
ja_example: I called up my new age visualization skills.

zh: 中立性，不偏不倚的態度。
en: Researcher's neutrality was unavailable to me at the time.
en_example: Researcher's neutrality was unavailable to me at the time.
zh_example: Researcher's neutrality was unavailable to me at the time.
ja: 中立性、偏らない態度。
ja_example: Researcher's neutrality was unavailable to me at the time.

zh: 情緒，人的感覺和情感反應。
en: My early life gave me superintendents for the emotions of others.
en_example: My early life gave me superintendents for the emotions of others.
zh_example: My early life gave me superintendents for the emotions of others.
ja: 感情、人の感じや感情の反応。
ja_example: My early life gave me superintendents for the emotions of others.

zh: 界限，個人或群體間的界線或限制。
en: Keeping some kind of order with honesty, boundaries, kindness, and gratitude.
en_example: Keeping some kind of order with honesty, boundaries, kindness, and gratitude.
zh_example: Keeping some kind of order with honesty, boundaries, kindness, and gratitude.
ja: 境界、個人やグループ間の線や制限。
ja_example: Keeping some kind of order with honesty, boundaries, kindness, and gratitude.

zh: 感謝，對他人幫助或好意的感激之情。
en: I thank myself for their contributions with gratitude.
en_example: I thank myself for their contributions with gratitude.
zh_example: I thank myself for their contributions with gratitude.
ja: 感謝、他人の助けや好意に対する感謝の気持ち。
ja_example: I thank myself for their contributions with gratitude.

zh: 稜鏡，一種能將光線分解成多色光的透明體，比喻多面向的自我。
en: I think of my fragmented self less like a broken mirror and more like a prism.
en_example: I think of my fragmented self less like a broken mirror and more like a prism.
zh_example: I think of my fragmented self less like a broken mirror and more like a prism.
ja: プリズム、光を分解して多色光にする透明体、多面的な自己の比喩。
ja_example: I think of my fragmented self less like a broken mirror and more like a prism.

zh: 自我對話，個人內心的自我溝通。
en: My openings for self-talk and focus groups sound almost identical.
en_example: My openings for self-talk and focus groups sound almost identical.
zh_example: My openings for self-talk and focus groups sound almost identical.
ja: セルフトーク、自分自身との内面的な会話。
ja_example: My openings for self-talk and focus groups sound almost identical.

zh: 脆弱的，容易受到傷害或影響的狀態。
en: I asked them to be honest and vulnerable with me.
en_example: I asked them to be honest and vulnerable with me.
zh_example: I asked them to be honest and vulnerable with me.
ja: 脆弱な、傷つきやすい状態。
ja_example: I asked them to be honest and vulnerable with me.

zh: 閉嘴，叫別人或自己停止說話。
en: Sometimes I would hear myself shouting, shut up, to my own mind.
en_example: Sometimes I would hear myself shouting, shut up, to my own mind.
zh_example: Sometimes I would hear myself shouting, shut up, to my own mind.
ja: 黙れ、他人や自分に話をやめるように言うこと。
ja_example: Sometimes I would hear myself shouting, shut up, to my own mind.

zh: 情緒化的，容易被感情影響的。
en: There's a really sentimental, emotional me.
en_example: There's a really sentimental, emotional me.
zh_example: There's a really sentimental, emotional me.
ja: 感情的な、感情に影響されやすい。
ja_example: There's a really sentimental, emotional me.

zh: 理智的，重視思考和理論的。
en: There's an intellectual me.
en_example: There's an intellectual me.
zh_example: There's an intellectual me.
ja: 知的な、思考や理論を重視する。
ja_example: There's an intellectual me.
